## Checklist

- [ ] I forked the repo and branched off `main` (no direct pushes to `main` are permitted)
- [ ] Tests added/updated and `go test -race ./...` passes locally
- [ ] `golangci-lint run` passes locally
- [ ] Docs updated (`docs/`, `README.md`, or `CLI` reference) if behavior changed
- [ ] Plain-mode parity preserved: any new interactive TUI flow has an equivalent non-interactive CLI flag
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or local paths committed
